---
id: get-application
title: "Get Application"
description: "Partner use `/financing/v3/applications/{applicationId}/orders/deliver` resource where `{applicationId}` is the *application* ID received in the response of `/financing/v3/applications` after its creation."

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Application"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/financing/v3/applications/{applicationId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Partner use `/financing/v3/applications/{applicationId}/orders/deliver` resource where `{applicationId}` is the *application* ID received in the response of `/financing/v3/applications` after its creation.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"applicationId","in":"path","description":"","required":true,"example":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["id","status"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","description":"Primary identifier of the application"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["CREATED","PRESCORED","ALTERNATIVE","VERIFICATION","APPROVED","CONFIRMED","REJECTED","CANCELLED"],"description":"Application status"},"workflowSteps":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["code","priority","mandatory"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","enum":["REDIRECT","DELIVERY","CANCELLATION"],"description":"Workflow code"},"priority":{"type":"number","example":1,"description":"Identifier of workflow step's priority expressed as number (lowest number means highest priority)"},"mandatory":{"type":"boolean","example":true,"description":"Available workflow step for current application in application process."},"redirect":{"type":"object","required":["gatewayRedirectUrl"],"properties":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","example":"https://nasplatky.homecredit.cz","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Partner SHOULD redirect customer to this address for continuation of application approval process."}},"title":"RedirectURL"}},"title":"FinancingWorkflowStep"},"description":"Collection of currently available application process actions."}},"title":"ApplicationBase"},{"type":"object","required":["financedSubject"],"properties":{"financedSubject":{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ORDER"],"description":"Financed subject type"},"order":{"type":"object","required":["status"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"string","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","PAID","CANCELLED","TERMINATED"],"description":"Status of the Order"}},"title":"GetOrder"}},"title":"GetFinancedSubject"}}}],"title":"GetApplicationDetail"}}}},"422":{"description":"Status change can not be processed","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Array with errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
